XMLDB.COMMENT: XMLDB file for AI Dialogue module

TABLE.NAME: aidialogue
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per AI Dialogue activity instance added to a course.

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to course.

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity name shown on course page.

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description.

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Format of the intro field. Moodle text format constant.

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when activity was created.

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — last settings change.

FIELD.NAME: aiurl
FIELD.COMMENT: AI provider endpoint URL. Validated at session start, not save time.

FIELD.NAME: aiapikey
FIELD.COMMENT: API key for the AI provider. Stored as plain text in v1.

FIELD.NAME: aimodel
FIELD.COMMENT: Model identifier, e.g. gpt-4o, gemini-1.5-pro.

FIELD.NAME: knowledgetext
FIELD.COMMENT: Teacher-authored source-of-truth injected into the AI system prompt.

FIELD.NAME: maxattempts
FIELD.COMMENT: Max attempts a student is allowed. 0 = unlimited. Independent of completion rules.

FIELD.NAME: completionpassed
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity completes when student achieves a passed session. 0=off, 1=on. Passed = all criteria met in a single session.

FIELD.NAME: completionexhausted
FIELD.COMMENT: Fallback completion when all attempts exhausted without passing. Only fires when completionpassed=1 AND maxattempts>0.

TABLE.NAME: aidialogue_criterion
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per rubric criterion. Up to 5 per activity.

FIELD.NAME: aidialogueid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue.

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based. Engine processes criteria in ascending order.

FIELD.NAME: bloomslevel
FIELD.COMMENT: Bloom's taxonomy level. Plain int: 1=Analyze, 2=Evaluate, 4=Create, 8=Custom. No combinations.

FIELD.NAME: description
FIELD.COMMENT: What evidence would satisfy this criterion. For bloomslevel=8 this is the primary AI instruction.

FIELD.NAME: minturns
FIELD.COMMENT: Min turns AI must probe before closing this criterion. Must be > 0.

FIELD.NAME: maxturns
FIELD.COMMENT: Hard cap on turns for this criterion. Must be > 0 and > minturns. AI forced to close criterion when reached.

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when criterion was created.

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — last change.

TABLE.NAME: aidialogue_session
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per student attempt at the activity.

FIELD.NAME: aidialogueid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to user.

FIELD.NAME: attemptnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based. Increments per student per activity.

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: Current state of the session. Valid values: pending, active, complete.

FIELD.NAME: studentreport
FIELD.COMMENT: Plain language feedback shown to student. Written by AI at session_close. Null until then.

FIELD.NAME: teacherreport
FIELD.COMMENT: Cross-criterion narrative shown to teacher. Written by AI at session_close. Null until then.

FIELD.NAME: aigrade
FIELD.COMMENT: AI-suggested grade percentage. Null when grading off or session not yet complete.

FIELD.NAME: teachergrade
FIELD.COMMENT: Teacher override grade. Null until teacher explicitly sets it.

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when session row was created.

FIELD.NAME: timestarted
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when student sent first message. Null until first turn.

FIELD.NAME: timefinished
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when session_close fired. Null until session completes.

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — last change to this row.

TABLE.NAME: aidialogue_turn
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per message in the conversation.

FIELD.NAME: sessionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue_session.

FIELD.NAME: criterionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue_criterion. Null during session_open and session_close turns.

FIELD.NAME: role
FIELD.COMMENT: Who authored this turn. Valid values: student, ai.

FIELD.NAME: move
FIELD.COMMENT: Typed move made by the AI. Null for student turns. Valid values: session_open, session_close, criterion_open, criterion_close, probe_deeper, probe_clarify.

FIELD.NAME: content
FIELD.COMMENT: The actual message text.

FIELD.NAME: turnnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based position of this turn in the session. Global across whole session, not per criterion.

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — when turn was created.

TABLE.NAME: aidialogue_criterion_result
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per criterion per session. All rows inserted at session creation with status=pending.

FIELD.NAME: sessionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue_session.

FIELD.NAME: criterionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to aidialogue_criterion.

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: Evaluation outcome. Valid values: pending, in_progress, met, partial, limit.

FIELD.NAME: evidence
FIELD.COMMENT: Quoted excerpt from conversation used as evidence. Null until criterion closed at criterion_close.

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — row created at session creation.

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp — last status change.
